school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: Either Pavilion goes with Period 3 or Period 6 goes with Annex.
Nash's grade is lower than both the class in the Cloister's grade and the class in Period 6's grade.
Period 5 goes with at least one of Nash, Annex, or Cloister.
Exactly two of these are true: Hale goes with Studio; Nash goes with Period 5; Cloister goes with 88%.
If Studio goes with Period 3, then Cloister goes with 88%.
Either Cloister goes with Period 3 or Studio goes with Period 3.
84% goes with exactly two of Hale, Cloister, and Period 3.
If either Bungalow goes with 86% or Annex goes with Boyd (but not both), then either Period 1 does not go with Greenhouse or Period 6 goes with 86%.
82% goes with either Boyd or Dunn.
86%, Period 1, and Period 2 go with Dunn, Bungalow, and Pavilion, in some order.
Exactly two of these are true: Boyd goes with 90%; Carver goes with Period 2; Studio goes with Period 6.

chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
